expectations.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses '# Code Review: PR #22217' header (not '## PR Review'). No '**Target:**' metadata line. Branch info is on line 4 ('targeting v18/dev') but not in the required format. Has a '## Verdict' section on line 113 with 'Approve with minor suggestions'. Has structured format but not the specified '## PR Review' + '**Target:**' format.

expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: Line 4: 'pr/22217 targeting `v18/dev`' - correctly references v18/dev as the target branch.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default webhook payload type from the current default to 'Minimal'
expectations.evidence: Lines 93-100 contain a detailed 'Behavioral breaking change' section explaining that existing installations upgrading to v18 without explicit config will get Minimal payloads instead of Legacy, and what consumers need to do (explicitly configure Legacy or update their webhook consumers).

expectations.text: Review output is under 150 lines — proportionate to the tiny 3-file, 25-line change
expectations.evidence: Review is 122 lines. Under the 150-line threshold but notably verbose for a 3-file, 25-line change.
